title: Thismia pachyantha
taxonomy: Thismia pachyantha is classified within the family Thismiaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as slipper orchids. The genus Thismia is a part of the order Asparagales, which also includes other plant families such as Amaryllidaceae and Orchidaceae. Thismia pachyantha is native to China and is a member of the monocotyledonous angiosperms. The classification of Thismia pachyantha is based on its unique morphological features and molecular phylogenetic analysis. Thismia pachyantha's classification is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the field of botany.
